name: global-government-contracts-aggregator
title: Global Government Contracts & Tenders Scraper
description: Find and triage public tenders from official UK Contracts Finder, EU TED, and optional SAM.gov sources. Returns stable IDs, buyers, dates, values, match evidence, deterministic fit scores, red flags, recommended actions, official URLs, and a ranked Markdown report.

contract-scraped.eventDescription: Charged once for each clean public government contract or tender record saved to the dataset.
